mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications (member_id, notifications_type, notifications_content, notifications_target_type) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{notificationsType}, #{notificationsContent}, #{notificationsTargetType})
mapper.select: SELECT notifications_id, member_id, notifications_type, notifications_content, notifications_target_type, notifications_read_status, notifications_created_at FROM notifications WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND notifications_target_type != 'chatroom' ORDER BY notifications_created_at DESC LIMIT 100
mapper.update: UPDATE notifications SET notifications_read_status = '읽음' WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND notifications_target_type != 'chatroom' AND notifications_read_status = '안읽음'
mapper.select: SELECT notifications_id, member_id, notifications_type, notifications_content, notifications_target_type, notifications_read_status, notifications_created_at FROM notifications WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND notifications_target_type = 'chatroom' ORDER BY notifications_created_at DESC LIMIT 100
mapper.update: UPDATE notifications SET notifications_read_status = '읽음' WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND notifications_target_type = 'chatroom' AND notifications_read_status = '안읽음'
